svg.title: Kendra Scott Meraki topology with physical device representation
svg.desc: Hub-and-spoke SD-WAN with schematic drawings of MX firewalls, MS switches, and MR access points at every site tier. 333 MX, 253 MS, 245 MR across 110+ sites.
svg.text: Kendra Scott — Meraki SD-WAN, hub-and-spoke · with physical device view
Cloud control plane · all device mgmt
~105 sites — each spoke runs MX + MS + MR locally, joined to hubs via AutoVPN
• AutoVPN site-to-site between Rackspace hubs and every retail spoke — Meraki SD-WAN, no MPLS
• Lamar HQ runs the older MX400 chassis HA pair; DC and Rackspace standardized on MX250
• 14× MX68CW-NA stores carry LTE backup for cellular failover during ISP outages
• MR52 dominates the AP estate (126 units) — concentrated at Lamar HQ (54) and DC (27)
• Camera networks run as separate Meraki networks at Lamar HQ and DC (not counted above)
• 20× MR74 outdoor APs deployed at properties with patio / outdoor activation needs
